Description: Controls provisioning, modification, and removal of access to protected assets
Key Evidence: Current user list + approval records + deprovision logs
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if review <90 days AND orphaned accounts <3; Yellow 3-7; Red >7 or overdue
Defense Notes: Map to NIST AC-2/AC-6. Flag CUI-linked service accounts.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: AC-2 Account Management; AC-3 Access Enforcement; AC-6 Least Privilege; IA-2
Implementation Statement: Quarterly IAM reviews executed with automated orphaned account detection via Sentinel.

Description: Authentication mechanisms and authorization controls enforce least privilege
Key Evidence: MFA enforcement report + password policy config + RBAC matrix
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if MFA enforced on 100% of human accounts
Defense Notes: Align with CMMC Level 2. Hardware MFA for admins recommended.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: IA-2 Identification and Authentication; IA-5 Authenticator Management
Implementation Statement: MFA enforced for workforce accounts; config drift monitored continuously.

Description: Controls over privileged access including monitoring and review
Key Evidence: Privileged user list + session recordings + justification docs
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if all privileged accounts reviewed; no standing admin without break-glass
Defense Notes: Break-glass accounts require dual control and 24h audit trail.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: AC-2(3) Privileged Accounts; AC-6 Least Privilege
Implementation Statement: Privileged access reviewed quarterly with automated export.

Description: Detection and monitoring procedures to identify anomalies and control failures
Key Evidence: Log completeness report + alert coverage + retention verification
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if >95% critical events logged and retained 1yr+; no gaps >24h
Defense Notes: CloudTrail + VPC flow logs required for production.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: AU-2; AU-3; AU-6; SI-4 System Monitoring
Implementation Statement: Centralized logging with completeness checks via Sentinel log aggregator.

Description: Ongoing monitoring of operation and effectiveness of controls
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if zero critical control failures in last 30 days
Defense Notes: Track failed auth on CUI data stores.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: SI-4 System Monitoring; CA-2 Control Assessments
Implementation Statement: Control effectiveness tracked via monitoring metrics and exceptions.

Description: Controls over changes to systems, infrastructure, and data
Key Evidence: Change tickets + approvals + rollback test results
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if all production changes have ticket + approval + tested rollback
Defense Notes: CAB required for customer data changes.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: CM-3 Configuration Change Control; CM-4 Impact Analysis
Implementation Statement: Changes tracked via ticketing; config drift monitored for unauthorized changes.

Description: Identification, assessment, and mitigation of risks to objectives
Key Evidence: Risk register + mitigation plans + residual risk sign-off
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if risk assessment <6mo old and high risks have active mitigation
Defense Notes: Include supply-chain risk for CUI vendors.
Implementation Statement: Annual risk assessment maintained; vulnerability scanning on roadmap.

Description: Controls to identify and protect confidential information
Key Evidence: Data inventory + classification labels + access restrictions
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if all CUI data classified and access restricted
Defense Notes: Explicit CUI marking and flow controls per NIST 800-171.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: AC-4 Information Flow Enforcement; MP-2 Media Access
Implementation Statement: Data inventory maintained; encryption status validates protected stores.

Description: Controls to ensure backups and recovery procedures meet availability objectives
Key Evidence: Backup logs + restore test results + RTO/RPO evidence
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if last restore test successful within SLA
Defense Notes: Restore tests must include CUI data scope.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: CP-9 Information System Backup; CP-10 Recovery (partial)
Implementation Statement: Backups automated; restore testing documented quarterly.

Description: Controls to protect against and recover from failures
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if failover test passed in last 90 days
Implementation Statement: Resilience tested quarterly; infrastructure drift monitored.

Description: Confidential information protected from unauthorized access, use, and disclosure
Related Policy: Data Classification Policy v2.1 + Access Control Policy v2.3
Key Evidence: Data inventory with classification tags + access logs + DLP alerts
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if 100% confidential data tagged and access restricted
Defense Notes: CUI must be explicitly marked; access logged.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: AC-3; AC-4; SC-16 Transmission of Security Attributes
Implementation Statement: Classification inventory linked to encryption and access evidence.

Description: Confidential information encrypted in transit and at rest using approved methods
Key Evidence: Encryption status for storage and transit; FIPS/TLS audit
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if all CUI resources encrypted; Red on any unencrypted CUI store
Defense Notes: AES-256 + FIPS validated crypto; annual key rotation minimum.
NIST 800-171 Mapping: SC-8; SC-13 Cryptographic Protection; SC-28 Protection at Rest
Implementation Statement: Encryption posture validated continuously via Sentinel encryption_status collector.

Description: Confidential information transmitted only over secure channels
Key Evidence: TLS configuration audit + certificate inventory + WAF/SG rules
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if all public endpoints enforce TLS 1.2+
Defense Notes: Mutual TLS for machine-to-machine CUI flows where applicable.
Implementation Statement: TLS configuration monitored; weak cipher endpoints flagged.

Description: Confidential information securely disposed when no longer required
Key Evidence: Disposal logs + destruction certificates + lifecycle policies
Dashboard Status Logic: Green if objects past retention have deletion proof
Defense Notes: CUI destruction per NIST SP 800-88; log destruction events.
Implementation Statement: Lifecycle and retention rules validated via retention_check collector.
